[select all](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246) [cancel selecting](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246) 900 views 14 likes 2 links 7 users [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/lebedeviv/48/70938_2.png)2](https://forum.cursor.com/u/LebedevIV "LebedevIV") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/justinjtownsend/48/44458_2.png)2](https://forum.cursor.com/u/justinjtownsend "justinjtownsend") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/deanrie/48/1263_2.png)2](https://forum.cursor.com/u/deanrie "deanrie") [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/n/838e76/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/NoaG "NoaG") [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/a/f14d63/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/AlteriusOmega "AlteriusOmega") [Jun 2025](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246/1 "Jump to the first post") 1 / 10 Jun 2025 [4d ago](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246/10) ## post by justinjtownsend on Jun 19, 2025 [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/justinjtownsend/48/44458_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/justinjtownsend) [justinjtownsend](https://forum.cursor.com/u/justinjtownsend) 2 [Jun 2025](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246 "Post date") Hey Cursor Team, As I build my history of working with Cursor, especially the chat interface, I find myself wanting to give my individual chats a name (essentially be able to edit what shows up in the tab at the top). Perhaps this can be possible sometime. I could see it being useful in the context of larger projects where you might link the chat to a requirement (e.g. a ticket, or feature the customer requires). This would come in handy for recall from @past chats also. Many thanks, Justin ### Solved ​ [​](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246/2 "go to the quoted post") > Hey, you can actually do this by opening the chat history window. > > [![image](https://us1.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/optimized/3X/3/4/34f01f6c5a697a158efa6ae4a4f3650250659cbb_2_690x143.png)\\ > image1386×288 14.7 KB](https://us1.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/original/3X/3/4/34f01f6c5a697a158efa6ae4a4f3650250659cbb.png "image") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/deanrie/24/1263_2.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/deanrie) by Dean Rie in [post 2](https://forum.cursor.com/t/change-the-chat-name/106246/2) accepted by justinjtownsend 1 ​ ​ 900 views 14 likes 2 links 7 users [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/lebedeviv/48/70938_2.png)2](https://forum.cursor.com/u/LebedevIV "LebedevIV") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/justinjtownsend/48/44458_2.png)2](https://forum.cursor.com/u/justinjtownsend "justinjtownsend") [![](https://sea3.discourse-cdn.com/cursor1/user_avatar/forum.cursor.com/deanrie/48/1263_2.png)2](https://forum.cursor.com/u/deanrie "deanrie") [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/n/838e76/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/NoaG "NoaG") [![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/a/f14d63/48.png)](https://forum.cursor.com/u/AlteriusOmega "AlteriusOmega") ## metadata.twitter:description: Hey Cursor Team,  As I build my history of working with Cursor, especially the chat interface, I find myself wanting to give my individual chats a name (essentially be able to edit what shows up in the tab at the top).  Perhaps this can be possible sometime. I could see it being useful in the context of larger projects where you might link the chat to a requirement (e.g. a ticket, or feature the customer requires). This would come in handy for recall from @past chats also.  Many thanks,  Justin

This would come in handy for recall from @past chats also.  Many thanks,  Justin
